font-family.title: Font
font-family.summary: The typeface used for terminal text.

font-feature.title: Ligatures
font-feature.summary: Turn font ligatures and stylistic sets on or off.

background-opacity.title: Window opacity
background-opacity.summary: How see-through the window background is — 100% is solid.

background-blur.title: Background blur
background-blur.summary: Blur whatever shows through a transparent window.

theme.title: Theme
theme.summary: The color theme applied to the terminal.

minimum-contrast.title: Minimum contrast
minimum-contrast.summary: Force a minimum contrast between text and its background.

window-padding-x.title: Horizontal padding
window-padding-x.summary: Space between the text and the window's left and right edges.

window-padding-y.title: Vertical padding
window-padding-y.summary: Space between the text and the window's top and bottom edges.

window-decoration.title: Window border & controls
window-decoration.summary: Show or hide the title bar and window buttons.

window-save-state.title: Reopen windows on launch
window-save-state.summary: Restore your windows and tabs when Ghostty starts.

scrollback-limit.title: Scrollback size
scrollback-limit.summary: How much terminal history to keep.

copy-on-select.title: Copy on select
copy-on-select.summary: Copy text to the clipboard as soon as you select it.

clipboard-read.title: Allow apps to read the clipboard

clipboard-write.title: Allow apps to write the clipboard

bell-features.title: Bell behavior
bell-features.summary: How Ghostty reacts to the terminal bell.

shell-integration.title: Shell integration
shell-integration.summary: Enable shell features like command tracking and jump-to-prompt.

command.title: Startup command
command.summary: Run this instead of your default login shell.

macos-option-as-alt.title: Use Option as Alt
macos-option-as-alt.summary: Send Alt/Meta when you press the Option key.

confirm-close-surface.title: Confirm before closing
confirm-close-surface.summary: Ask before closing a terminal that's still running something.

term.title: TERM value
term.summary: The value of the TERM environment variable.
